{{Infobox concept
| name = Lowgold
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Lowgold Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Lowgold represents the initial stage of advancement within the [[Gold]] tier of [[sacred artists]]. It is a significant leap in power from the preceding [[Iron stage]], characterized by the presence of a [[Goldsign]]—a visible manifestation of a [[Remnant]] parasite located within the artist's core. While Lowgolds possess vastly more strength and speed than those in lower ranks, they are considered the weakest tier of [[Gold]], sitting below [[Highgold]] and [[Truegold]]. In practical terms, Lowgolds are often utilized as guards, bodyguards, or participants in large-scale organized events and combat trials. They are frequently grouped into teams alongside higher-ranked artists, such as Highgolds, to fulfill specific roles like protection or message delivery. Despite being the entry point for this tier, reaching Lowgold is a notable achievement that separates [[sacred artists]] from commoners and lower-ranked practitioners. However, the progression beyond this stage is difficult; for instance, only a small fraction of Lowgolds successfully advance to [[Highgold]]. Within social and combat hierarchies, Lowgolds are ranked based on individual power, skill, and influence, with elite individuals appearing on specialized combat charts.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Lowgold represents the initial rank within the [[Gold stage]] of advancement. This level of strength sits above [[Jade]] but remains below the status of [[Highgold]]. During encounters with [[Remnants]], individuals at this stage have been observed. Reaching the subsequent [[Highgold]] level is a rare feat achieved by only one in a thousand who progress through Lowgold.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lowgold]] is the first rank of [[Gold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lowgold]] is a stage of progression.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Remnants]] encountered are from a couple of Lowgolds.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lowgold]] is a level of strength or status.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lowgold]] is a stage of advancement above [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lowgold]] is a level of advancement below [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lowgold]] is a level within the [[Gold stage]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lowgold]] is a stage or status associated with [[Lindon]]'s companion.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lowgold]] is a stage of advancement where only one in a thousand reaches [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Lowgold serves as both a specific training course level and a distinct stage or rank within the progression of power. It is identified as a potential destination for [[Lindon]] to visit. During this stage, [[Yerin]] demonstrated significant skill and control over her abilities. However, the rank also carries danger, as [[Jai Long]] expresses an intention to kill those at the Lowgold level.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lowgold]] is a training course level.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lowgold]] is a place [[Lindon]] might go.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Lowgolds are a stage or rank.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] displayed skill and control at the [[Lowgold]] stage.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] intends to kill the [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Lowgold represents a specific stage of power capable of moving faster than [[Jade]], and it serves as a formal rank within the combat charts. [[Lindon]] achieved this stage in his pure core by utilizing both refined Lowgold and [[Highgold]] cores. This classification is used as a designation at the [[Skysworn]] fairground, where Lowgolds are identified as a group of gray-skinned people. Within the [[Skysworn]] trainee hierarchy, those at the Lowgold level are considered lower-class students, though it is a position for which [[Lindon]] is qualified to apply.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Lowgolds are a stage of power that can move faster than [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lowgold]] is a stage of power held by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lowgold]] is a rank or classification in the combat charts.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] used refined [[Lowgold]] and [[Highgold]] cores to reach [[Lowgold]] in his pure core.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lowgold]] is a position [[Lindon]] is qualified to apply for.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lowgold]] and [[Highgold]] are designations used at the [[Skysworn]] fairground.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Lowgolds are a group of gray-skinned people.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Lowgolds are lower-class students among the [[Skysworn]] trainees.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Lowgold represents a specific stage of power that is susceptible to being consumed by Enkai's fire in mere seconds. During the events involving the oracle, this individual was a Lowgold who eventually ascended to the level of [[Truegold]]. In other instances, a young woman has been known to command a Lowgold to hold its position. As a type of person [[Lindon]] fights, the Lowgold remains a living threat, such as when [[Ekeri]] intends to use two Lowgold assistants to ensure [[Lindon]] cannot escape.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Lowgold]] is a level of power that can be devoured by Enkai's fire in seconds.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The young woman commands [[Lowgold]] to hold.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The students sent by the [[Heralds]] are [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Lowgold]] is still alive.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] will have two [[Lowgold]] assistants to prevent [[Lindon]] from running.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Lowgold]] is a type of person [[Lindon]] fights.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lowgold]] is a stage of power.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The oracle was a [[Lowgold]] who was raised to [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The squad included three [[Lowgold]] students.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lowgold]] injured share large tents with dozens of other people.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Advancement can help a lifeline.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] spent time trapped at [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Lowgolds are described as having unusual perceptiveness in a crowd.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The woman [[Lindon]] is speaking to is a [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]]'s power loss makes her as weak to [[Lindon]]'s perception as a [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A girl [[Lindon]] meets is a [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[Lowgold]] child is from the Wilds.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lowgold]] is a stage or milestone [[Seisha]] intends to fix her [[Path]] before reaching.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lowgold]] is a stage of advancement for [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Lowgold]] could potentially open the seventh page of [[Mercy]]'s Book.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Wei Shi [[Kelsa]] is a [[Lowgold]] of the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kelsa]] identifies as a [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The contents of the first page of the Book of Eternal Night were made for Lowgolds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Two young Lowgolds were clashing on the stage.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lowgold]] is a rank or level below the [[Abidan]] middle ranks.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Lowgolds were fighting [[Bloody Thorn]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“I believe I'm qualified to apply for one of the Lowgold positions.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Each had a pair of characters floating overhead, projected on cloud madra. They spelled out the words "Lowgold" and "Highgold."<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“Hold, Lowgold,” the young woman commanded.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
